title: OmniConnection
description: Omni BI connector: models, topics, workbooks/dashboards and lineage

hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: Host and Port of the Omni instance.

token.title: API Token
token.description: API token to authenticate with Omni.

dashboardFilterPattern.description: Regex to exclude or include dashboards that matches the pattern.
dashboardFilterPattern.title: Default Dashboard Filter Pattern

chartFilterPattern.description: Regex to exclude or include charts that matches the pattern.
chartFilterPattern.title: Default Chart Filter Pattern

dataModelFilterPattern.description: Regex to exclude or include data models (Omni topics) that matches the pattern.
dataModelFilterPattern.title: Default Data Model Filter Pattern

projectFilterPattern.description: Regex to exclude or include projects that matches the pattern.
projectFilterPattern.title: Default Project Filter Pattern
